title: International generalization: Transformer does NOT transfer
method: Train Transformer on intl data 2010-2016, validate 2017-2019, test on 2020-2024 (intl H1). H2: 2005-2009 train, 2010-2014 test.
headline: Transformer does NOT transfer to international assets. 5/5 intl assets are NEGATIVE on H1. The model learns US-specific patterns that don't generalize. This is an honest limitation that should be in the paper.
interpretation: The Transformer is US-specific. International generalization requires either (a) per-region models, (b) meta-learning, or (c) fundamentally different architecture. We acknowledge this as a limitation. The cascade SLOPE does generalize internationally (we have data showing this), but the non-linear Transformer does not.
